sys_script_client.description:
2.7.2 - 2022-02-13 - raj - STRY0117649 - "Delete" and "Deactivate" buttons should be available on the Template pane of the template edit pane.
Works with 2 UI Actions that Enable and Disable Shared Attachments for STRY0063547 Works with 2 UI Actions that Enable and Disable Shared Documents for STRY0063747
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Template Shared Attachments Warning Tasker - Template Shared Documents Warning Tasker - Template Delete Warning
sys_script_client.name: Template OnSubmit
